title: Judge Vista Stainless Steel Medium Saucepan, 16cm, 1L Shatterproof Vented Glass Lid, Induction Ready, Oven Safe
features: • Quality 18/10 stainless steel 61 mm fully encapsulated aluminium base
• Stay cool knobs and handles in a black phenolic finish
description: Product Description ABOUT JUDGE Judge homewares have been a favourite in homes for more than a century. The brand is known all over the world for its high quality and impressive performance. JUDGE VISTA STAINLESS STEEL KEY FEATURES 18/10 food grade Stainless Steel Induction ready 'hot-forged' base Saucepans have handy measuring marks on the inside Toughened glass lid, with vent to prevent overboiling Suitable for Gas, Electric, Halogen, Ceramic & Solid Plate Stay Cool Handles Oven Safe up to 180°C Dishwasher safe OVEN SAFE HANDLE Phenolic handles don't conduct heat like metal, so they stay cooler to the touch. They feel safe and secure and can also be used in the oven up to 180℃. CLASSIC CURVED SIDES Beautifully shaped, the curved walls maximise heat conduction and make it easy to stir everything in the pan as the spoon fits into the rounded corners. IMPRESSIVE PERFORMANCE Designed to give outstanding cooking results on all types of hob, with a thick 'hot forged base' to ensure efficient and even heat distribution for years to come.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Dishwasher-Safe, Gas Stovetop Compatible, Induction Stovetop Compatible
